situation: SZ-PP-M-005 from audit-2026-07-07-047: Auto-save debounce timer (300ms) in SettingsPage.tsx only cleared on unmount, not flushed. User closes popup within debounce window → last settings edit silently lost.
action: Modified useEffect cleanup in SettingsPage.tsx: when saveTimerRef.current is set (timer pending), clearTimeout + immediately fire chrome.runtime.sendMessage saveSettings with latestSettingsRef.current (fire-and-forget, no setState after unmount). Added .catch for error logging. cp-guard triggered (SettingsPage.tsx diverged from main due to prior SZ-PP-M-004/M-001/M-002/M-003 fixes), used case-104 direct wt commit escape hatch.
outcome_evidence: Commit 1cda116 on auto/opt-popup-1783215325 pushed to origin. Diff: +11/-1 lines in SettingsPage.tsx cleanup function. Prior commit 0f915ec (SZ-PP-M-004) intact.
next_suggestion: Next pending fix: SZ-PP-M-006 (All chrome.runtime.sendMessage calls lack timeout) — add AbortController or Promise.race timeout wrapper to sendMessage calls in popup.

audit_findings.finding: useEffect cleanup only clearTimeout without flushing pending save — last edit lost if popup closed within 300ms debounce window
audit_findings.remediation: Flush pending save on unmount: clearTimeout + immediate saveSettings with latestSettingsRef.current (fire-and-forget)
